allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Port 3000 in use by PID\(s\): " + \($p.OwningProcess -join ', '\); Get-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { "No process listening on port 3000" }; "--- node processes ---"; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
